title: apply_template core: validate, snapshot, instantiate
description:
Validate all preconditions and snapshot anchor dependencies before any mutation, then create the template's nodes.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] [hard] APPA-01: all preconditions are validated before the first mutation; a failure creates zero nodes.
- [ ] [hard] APPA-02: nodes are created with interpolated, non-empty descriptions and resolved doc locations.
- [ ] [hard] APPA-03: `apply_template(template, anchor_bindings, force)` rejects an already-applied container unless `force`; with `--force` it locates the existing breakdown node via `brackets:<C>`, reaches the planning node through it, and refreshes node descriptions/docs in place rather than duplicating nodes.
- [ ] [hard] APPA-04: each created node has its template-declared gate presets attached during instantiation.
